title: IUT Evidence Record
description: A bibliographic evidence record (paper, blog post, talk, formalization project, book).

url.description: Source URL for the evidence record. v0.7.14: pattern enforces http(s) only — Round 11 audit found `evidence.url` was left without scheme constraint while timeline.url was hardened in v0.7.13, allowing javascript:/data:/file: schemes to slip through schema validation and propagate to render_md (Markdown link emission) and MCP serializers.

archive_url.description: Wayback Machine (or other archival) snapshot URL for the primary `url`. Optional in v0.7.0 (population follow-up); v0.7.x must-band #6 will require Paper / Blog / Book records to carry an archive_url so that Round-6-class content drift can be detected post-hoc. v0.7.14 (Round 11): http(s) scheme pattern parity with `url`.
